title: Better Doors
description: Polished doors with non-mirrored textures, proper sides and hinges.
body:
![banner](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Dayyan-Zero/Better-Doors/refs/heads/main/external/better_doors_banner.png) ## About **Better Doors** is my personal vision of how doors _should_ look in Minecraft. Remodeled to match the vanilla aesthetic, these doors feature non-mirrored textures—so lighting flows naturally from top-left to bottom-right—and proper side textures that clearly show which side the hinges are on, giving a more realistic and intuitive look. This pack aims to be the visual refinement that our poor Minecraft doors deserve. ## Screenshots ![screenshots_image](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Dayyan-Zero/Better-Doors/refs/heads/main/external/screenshots.png) ## Additional Addon's - 3D doors Addon **(Out of Date)** - Programmer Art Addon **(Out of Date)** ## Contributing If you'd like to contribute to the development of Better Doors, visit the project's [GitHub repository](https://github.com/Dayyan-Zero/Better-Doors). ## License and Use

This work is licensed under CC BY-NC-SA 4.0

A **lot** of work goes into Resource Packs. Please respect the wishes of the authors, and consult with them before taking any action concerning their work. Thank you kindly.
